basicInfo.name: AI Voice Assistant Plush Buddy Luna
basicInfo.nameZh: AI语音助手毛绒伙伴露娜

features: Sings songs with synchronized mouth movement
Glowing cheeks change color with mood
Machine learning adapts to child preferences

sellingPoints: Combines comfort of plush with intelligence of AI
Safe voice interaction designed specifically for children
Helps with bedtime routine and sleep training
Adapts and grows with the child over time

aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionEn: Meet Luna – the huggable AI friend who talks, sings, and helps your child learn! Combining ultra-soft plush materials with cutting-edge voice AI, Luna is the perfect bedtime companion and daytime playmate that grows smarter every day.
aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionZh: 认识露娜——这个可以拥抱的AI朋友会说话、唱歌并帮助你的孩子学习！将超柔软的毛绒材料与尖端的语音AI相结合，露娜是完美的睡前伴侣和白天的玩伴，每天都在变得更聪明。

marketingCopy.headlineEn: Hug Intelligence – AI Voice Buddy Luna
marketingCopy.headlineZh: 拥抱智能——AI语音伙伴露娜
marketingCopy.bodyEn: Luna reimagines what a plush toy can be. Wrapped in premium huggable fabric lives a sophisticated AI brain that understands natural language, tells captivating stories, and even learns your child's preferences over time. Her glowing cheeks express emotions, her mouth moves when she sings, and her gentle voice never exceeds safe decibel levels. Luna isn't just soft – she's brilliantly smart.
marketingCopy.bodyZh: 露娜重新想象了毛绒玩具的可能性。包裹在优质可拥抱面料中的是一个精密的大脑，它能理解自然语言、讲述迷人的故事，甚至随着时间推移学习你孩子的偏好。她发光的脸颊表达情感，唱歌时嘴巴会动，她的温柔声音永远不会超过安全分贝水平。露娜不仅柔软——她还非常聪明。
